name: People Chow
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate chips and butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring constantly.
2. Remove from heat and add peanut butter and cinnamon. Stir until smooth.
3. Place cereal in a large bowl.
4. Pour the chocolate mixture over the cereal and stir until evenly coated.
5. Add powdered sugar to a large paper bag.
6. Add the chocolate-coated cereal to the bag and gently shake until evenly coated with sugar.
7. Spread onto waxed paper to cool completely.
8. Store in an airtight container.
